data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a 'Queue/routing escalation model', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or references to this model. The linked use case mentions the need for a queue/routing escalation model, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it is implemented or validated. This indicates a lack of sufficient evidence to confirm or deny the requirement's coverage.
gaps: No evidence of a queue/routing escalation model.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
